rationale: The cited paper appears as a single comparison point in the estimation-results discussion, where the authors note that their quality-related estimates are similar to Erdem, Zhao, and Valenzuela (2004). This is used as a plausibility/benchmark check for interpreting coefficients, not as a basis for the model structure, hypotheses, or core contribution. The citing paper's conceptual and methodological foundations are attributed mainly to other learning-model papers (e.g., Erdem and Keane 1996; Mehta et al. 2004).
